# Design: VisuDEV Blueprint Engine v1

<!-- generated by /feature-intake on 2026-07-05 -->

## Problem & Intent

VisuDEV Blueprint soll Code technisch diagnostizieren (Auth, Validation, DB, fehlende Controls) — nicht nur als Diagramm. Heute ist Blueprint ein Platzhalter; der Scan nutzt dieselbe App-Flow-Analyse ohne eigene Pipeline.

Ziel v1: evidence-basierte Blueprint Engine mit Security Matrix, Finding Inspector, Route Blueprint Canvas, GitHub- und Local-Mode.

## Non-Goals

- Python/.NET vollständige Parser (nur TS/JS v1, Python stub → unknown)
- Incremental file-hash cache (v2)
- LLM-generierte Findings ohne Evidence
- CI-Gate / Deploy-Blocker
- Team-custom Policy UI

## Assumptions

- Portfolio unter `2-DEV-PROJEKTE`: ~53 TS-Fullstack-Apps; Packs: next, hono, express, fastify, supabase, prisma, monorepo
- Dogfood: hrkoordinator, competeer v2, visudev-app
- Local Mode via Runner (Filesystem), GitHub via Edge Function
- Route Canvas: linear pipeline pro Route (nicht freies Graph)

## Options Considered

### Option A: Matrix only (rejected)

- Schnell, aber ohne Canvas — User-Anforderung widerspricht

### Option B: Blueprint-Pipeline im Analyzer + Local Runner (recommended)

- Shared IR, GitHub Edge + Node Runner für local_path
- Pros: passt AGENTS, wiederverwendet GitHubService
- Cons: Dual-Runtime (Deno + Node)

### Option C: YAGNI — FlowService erweitern (rejected)

- Regex-only → falsche Validation-Findings

## Decision

**Chosen:** Option B

## Cross-Domain Sign-Off

| Domain          | Status | Note                                 |
| --------------- | ------ | ------------------------------------ |
| KISS            | ⚠️     | Dual runtime; MVP in vertical slices |
| SOLID           | ✅     | fact/concept/policy getrennt         |
| DRY             | ✅     | GitHubService, Evidence-Muster       |
| Security        | ✅     | Analyse server-side / Runner         |
| UI/UX           | ✅     | Matrix + Canvas + Inspector          |
| Scaling         | ⚠️     | File limit 250, prioritize routes    |
| Testability     | ✅     | Deno unit für policies/facts         |
| Maintainability | ✅     | Policy-Objekte versionierbar         |

## Runtime matrix

| Slice            | GitHub (Edge) | Local (Runner)  |
| ---------------- | ------------- | --------------- |
| Engine core      | ✅            | ✅ shared logic |
| Analyze endpoint | ✅            | —               |
| Local runner     | —             | ✅              |
| UI               | ✅            | ✅              |

## Implementation Sketch

```
src/supabase/functions/visudev-analyzer/module/blueprint/
  dto/blueprint-document.dto.ts
  facts/fact-extractors.ts
  graph/import-resolver.ts, call-graph.builder.ts
  services/fact-engine, concept-engine, policy-engine, render, analysis
  validators/blueprint.validator.ts
  controllers/blueprint.controller.ts
  routes/blueprint.routes.ts

src/lib/visudev/blueprint-engine/   (types mirror for frontend)
src/modules/blueprint/components/
  SecurityMatrix.tsx, RouteBlueprintCanvas.tsx, FindingInspector.tsx
preview-runner/blueprint-analyze.js (local mode, Sprint 2)

Paths touched: store.tsx, BlueprintPage.tsx, types.ts, module/index.ts
New dependencies: none (regex v1; SWC spike deferred)
Estimated scope: ~3500 lines across slices
Tests: Deno unit (facts, policies), Vitest (render helpers)
```

## Open Questions

- [ ] SWC WASM in Deno — deferred; acorn/regex v1
- [ ] Native folder picker — v1.1; text field for local_path

## Ready for /implement

YES — vertical slice 1: core + GitHub analyze + Matrix/Canvas shell
